headline: Magnificent 7 News: Microsoft Rebounds While Apple and Alphabet Fall This Week
summary: It was a week that reminded investors how quickly the Magnificent 7 can splinter. AI optimism and fresh earnings momentum gave way to macro headwinds, geopolitical jitters, and stock-specific news pulling the cohort in opposite directions. The S&P 500 fell 1.98% for the week, and the Nasdaq 100 dropped 1.24%. The Magnificent 7 mirrored that ... Magnificent 7 News: Microsoft Rebounds While Apple and Alphabet Fall This Week

headline: TQQQ Holders Face a Risk That Has Nothing to Do With the Nasdaq Falling
summary: TQQQ has delivered a 47.69% gain over the past year and 2,653.53% over the past decade. Those numbers explain why retail investors keep coming back to it. The appeal is simple: own the Nasdaq-100, but with the accelerator pressed to the floor. In a sustained bull market, that logic works extraordinarily well. The problem is ... TQQQ Holders Face a Risk That Has Nothing to Do With the Nasdaq Falling

headline: Where is Apple’s headquarters? Apple Park explained
summary: Apple built its iconic headquarters known as Apple Park out of necessity. Its main office at 1 Infinite Loop was built in the early 1990s, and the tech giant needed more space to meet its rapid growth, having already used up a lot of the available office space in Cupertino.
